title: Customise the settings visible in calendar
excerpt:
I’d like to be able to customise what is visilble in a calendar item rather than just the name - similar to the new KanBan options where you can add different things to show on the cards.

posts.author: azaralady (Amanda M)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d like to be able to customise what is visilble in a calendar item rather than just the name - similar to the new KanBan options where you can add different things to show on the cards.

image3635×990 193 KB

We are scheduling sessions and coaches and I can’t easily see which coach is running which session without referring to the key and there aren’t enough unique colours for all the combinations. I’d love to be able to add the coaches names as a visible field.

posts.author: Dor_appSolution (Dor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @azaralady, We’ve developed a new calendar app packed with these features and much more. check it out: monday.com apps marketplace

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @azaralady, I hope you found a solution with the suggestion above! If want to display coaches etc. on your calendar items, and you’ve got timelines, subitems, or multiple date columns to display, Calendar Plus is a powerful option.
